ddls:
CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the email template */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the email template */,
  "body" TEXT /* HTML body content of the email template */,
  "repeating_section" TEXT /* Details of any repeating sections in the template */,
  "template_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of email */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the template */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the template */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is a draft */,
  "plain_text_body" TEXT /* Plain text version of the email body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES template_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_template_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_type_id") REFERENCES email_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email template being translated */,
  "culture" TEXT /* Culture code (e.g., en-US, fr-FR) */,
  "translated_subject" TEXT /* Translated subject line */,
  "translated_body" TEXT /* Translated body content */,
  "translated_repeating_section" TEXT /* Translated version of the repeating section */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the translation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the translation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, editor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email campaign */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email template used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., scheduled, sent, completed) */,
  "campaign_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the campaign */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  "total_recipients" INTEGER /* Total number of recipients in the campaign */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_campaigns_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_campaigns_campaign_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_type_id") REFERENCES email_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_campaigns_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a template */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email template */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email template */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Open rate percentage */,
  "click_rate" REAL /* Click rate percentage */,
  "sent_count" INTEGER /* Total number of emails sent using the template */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign for which the analytics are recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "unique_open_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique opens */,
  "unique_click_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique clicks */,
  "bounce_count" INTEGER /* Number of bounces */,
  "unsubscribe_count" INTEGER /* Number of unsubscribes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_analytics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES email_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_analytics_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the email type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the email type */,
  "is_transactional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the email type is transactional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the email type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the email type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_placeholders" (
  "placeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placeholder */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email template */,
  "placeholder" TEXT /* Placeholder key (e.g., [[User.UserName]]) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the placeholder's use */,
  "placeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of placeholder (e.g., user, order, store) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the placeholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placeholder was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the placeholder */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placeholder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_placeholders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_placeholders_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_placeholders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action was performed */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row where the action was performed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the email campaign */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Scheduled send time for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scheduled campaign (e.g., pending, sent) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the schedule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_schedules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_schedules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_schedules_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES email_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
